title: rotang niger
intro: Rotang niger, also known as Cissus niger, is a plant species native to tropical Africa, characterized by its woody vine with thorny stems and dark green leaves. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rotang niger include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating various infections, as well as promoting wound healing and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of Rotang niger include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, often used to treat various ailments and maintain overall health and well-being.
